title: Data Subject Rights Request
intro: Use this form to exercise any of the rights granted to you by LGPD Article 18. We will respond within 15 days. Personal identifiers (name, email, CPF) are hashed before storage; we cannot recover them in plain text.

types.label: Type of request
types.confirmation: Confirmation that we process your data
types.correction: Correction of incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data
types.refusal-consequences: Information about consequences of refusing consent

fields.name: Full name
fields.cpfHelp: Optional. We store only a SHA-256 hash and the last two digits.
fields.detailsPlaceholder: Describe the data or processing activity you are referring to (max 2000 characters).
fields.confirmSubject: I confirm I am the data subject or am authorized to act on their behalf.

errors.emailFormat: Please provide a valid email address.
errors.detailsTooLong: Details must be at most 2000 characters.
errors.confirmRequired: You must confirm you are the data subject.
errors.submitFailed: We could not record your request. Please try again later or email the DPO directly.

success.title: Request received
success.description: Your request was recorded. Please save the protocol number below — you will need it to follow up.
success.sla: We will respond within 15 days. Replies are sent to the email you provided.
